race.comment: Tricky race. RUE DE ROYALE (1) is racing in fine form and seems to do his best work down the straight. He was well supported here last time in a BM90 and was only caught late by the handy Ndola, now coming back to a BM78. The 3kg claim for Radley helps and he can take catching. BEHAVIOUR (7) is finding it tough to win but is going well, running on strongly here last time in the same race. He needs things to go his way but will be hard to hold out. FLYING MIKKI (6) has come back well, placing in both runs. He did beat home RUE DE ROYALE when they met here last time and fresh here can see him run another strong race. GOLD MEDALLIST (8) won all four starts first time in work, resuming as favourite at Sale but struggling. She's better than that. LEGACY BAY (11) is consistent without winning and has each way claims again.
